pattern: Each position's contribution is itself plus the best value seen so far, so a single left-to-right sweep that tracks a running maximum and a running total produces every prefix answer without recomputing anything.
hints: Define a helper value at each index: that index's number plus the largest number seen up to and including it.
The running maximum only ever grows as you move right, so update it once per step instead of rescanning.
Keep a running total of the helper values as you go — the total after processing index i is exactly the answer for that prefix.

edge_inputs.description: extreme values at both ends of the range
all equal values, running max never changes
strictly decreasing so the max is locked in after index 0

stress.description: random sequence, moderate size to keep the quadratic oracle fast
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(1000, size))
    nums = [rng.randint(1, 1000000000) for _ in range(n)]
    return [nums]
